turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, could I get a, uh, cappuccino, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! One cappuccino coming right up. Would you like any specific type of milk, like whole milk, skim milk, or maybe a dairy-free option?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there any special milk here? Like oat milk?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, absolutely! We do have oat milk available. Would you like to try your cappuccino with oat milk then?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, please. And one pump of vanilla syrup, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, oat milk cappuccino with a pump of vanilla syrup. That sounds delicious! Anything else I can add for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, today was a very tough day to me, so I need some special sweet dessert.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh, I’m sorry to hear that. We do have some lovely desserts! Would you like something like a pastry, maybe a cake, or a cookie to go with your drink?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Cake or pudding. I like it, especially the chocolate one. Could you recommend?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We have a delicious chocolate cake and also a rich chocolate pudding. I think both would pair wonderfully. Which one would you prefer to try today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What kind of chocolate pudding? Please, please explain me more detail.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Our chocolate pudding is super creamy and made with rich dark chocolate, and it has a smooth, velvety texture. It’s topped with a little whipped cream and maybe a sprinkle of cocoa powder. It’s definitely a treat! Sounds good?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, that's as good.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! So we’ll get you an oat milk cappuccino with vanilla syrup and a serving of our chocolate pudding. I’ll have that ready for you in just a moment! Anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “That's all. No, thank you. One more, please. My coffee, can I get a light one? I mean just one shot, please. Maybe it's a two shot, right?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! We can definitely make it a single shot for a lighter coffee flavor. So, one shot of espresso it is! I'll make sure everything's perfect for you. Anything else before I get started?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “That's all. Thank you. And where is the bathroom?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! The bathroom is just down the hall to your left, right next to the seating area. If you need anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is tissue in there?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, absolutely! You’ll find tissues inside the bathroom as well, so you should be all set. If you need anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Now, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Have a good day.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You too! Enjoy, and if you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I get a cup of water, please? And… Is there any… Tea?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll get you a cup of water right away. And yes, we do have tea as well. Would you like to try a specific type of tea, like black tea, green tea, or herbal?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I need milk decaffeinated one. I mean, I don't want more. I don't want a caffeinated one. My coffee is enough.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that makes sense! I’ll bring you a nice, soothing decaf tea with your order. I’ll have that all set for you as well. Let me know if there’s anything else you need!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to know some kind of tea with no caffeine.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We have several caffeine-free options, like chamomile, peppermint, and rooibos tea. Any of those sound good to you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Louisville's, that would be nice, the hot one.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect choice! I’ll get you a hot rooibos tea along with your order. That should be really cozy. If there's anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Now, that's all. Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I’ll get everything ready for you. Enjoy, and if you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And where can I sit?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re welcome to sit anywhere you’re comfortable! We have seating available just over there by the windows, or you can choose a cozy spot in the corner. Just pick whatever feels best for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, next to the window is good, but it looks like a little bit cold. Can I have a kind of blanket or something?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can definitely provide a blanket for you! I'll grab one and make sure you're nice and cozy by the window. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I’ll take care of everything, and I hope you have a lovely, relaxing time. Just let me know if you need anything at all!
